name: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc.
business: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. is an energy company that owns interests in oil and natural gas properties across six basins in the United States. It generates revenue from the sale of oil and natural gas production, primarily through third-party operators. The company focuses on non-operated working interests and operated partnerships, relying on operators to market and sell its production.

exposures.sentence: We derive our revenues from our interests in the sale of oil and natural gas production.

catalysts.event: Quarterly cash dividend declared for Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2026, our Board of Directors declared a cash dividend of $0.11 per share for the first quarter of 2026 that will be paid on March 13, 2026 to stockholders of record as of February 27, 2026.

catalysts.event: Start of quarterly principal repayments on 2029 Senior Notes
catalysts.sentence: The Company will repay quarterly 2.5% of the original principal amount of the notes issued on the closing date beginning on September 30, 2026.

extend the maturity date to the earliest to occur of (A) November 5, 2029 or (B) the date that is ninety-one days prior to the stated maturity date of the 2029 Senior Notes if any 2029 Senior Notes remain outstanding on such date.
